summary.lv: Eleving Consumer Finance (starptautisks FinTech uzņēmums) meklē AI Product Owner, kas vadīs MI risinājumu produkta backlog, definēs prioritātes un sadarbosies ar inženieru un datu zinātnes komandām.
summary.en: Eleving Consumer Finance, an international FinTech, is hiring an AI Product Owner to manage the AI product backlog, set priorities and partner with engineering and data science teams.
